name: Love Is Like A Cat
overview: A popular star, Piuno, who dislikes dogs due to trauma experienced in his childhood, meets Lee Dae Byeol, the owner of a dog cafe in Korea, and Gi Min who's one of his workers. Jun Hyeok is more than a friend to Dae Byeol and is one of his biggest supporters.

trailers.title: (SUB) official trailer ⎮ Love is like a Cat (사랑은 고양이처럼) ⎮ Mew Suppasit (뮤 슈파싯) & JM
